narrative.headline: SCRT2 advances across core capabilities while VegamDB deployment work shows recovery
narrative.overall_summary: SCRT2 demonstrates balanced progress at 53.2% completion across 32 epics, with teams executing critical Sharding, CDC, KV API, and GSI functionality. VegamDB achieves 83.3% completion with deployment work recovering from prior execution challenges.

weekly_status.headline: ## Weekly update for SCRT2 and VegamDB on SDB for the week of 2026-04-13
weekly_status.summary:
- SCRT2 M2.0 milestone completed with foundational KV API, CDC, and sharding capabilities delivered
- M3.0 work progressing on track with KV API Query/Scan, CDC with before/after images, and GSI runtime maintenance
- VegamDB deployment blocked on pre-prod cell provisioning issues
- Key integration points between mSDB and SDB engine components demonstrating successful end-to-end functionality

risks.summary: Timeline for bootstrapping ZOS on SDB is slipping. What does it do to the overall program
Need to define new timeline for GSI and impact on the overall program

action_items.summary: Define acceptance tests as exit criteria for SCRT2/ZOS as part of their 4/30 deliverable
How do we communicate GUCs for mSDB. Lot of work on the engine side is behind GUC (disabled by default to avoid impact to core). Now, for ZOS/mSDB, we want these GUCs to be on

SCRT2 milestones.narrative: Six teams execute 32 epics targeting M3.0 and M4.0 milestones, with SDB Query Proc Execution leading Sharding orchestration efforts at 56.4% completion despite 33 remaining items. CDC functionality shows early-stage development at 10.9% completion with Sayonara TxP's core implementation carrying 16 outstanding items, while KV API workstream progresses to 45.6% with strong Managed SDB integration support. Global Secondary Index concurrent creation remains a critical path item at 10% completion, though planner changes and runtime maintenance components advance steadily.

risks.summary: Need to have an acceptance test defined for VegamDB on SDB

action_items.summary: Need to reset timelines for VegamDB based on alignment with Anthony

VegamDB milestones.narrative: VegamDB reaches 83.3% completion with deployment work showing marked improvement from previous execution challenges. SDB LCM Foundation's pre-production cell builds advance to 50% completion under Watch status with 1 remaining item, representing significant progress from prior stalled state. Development activities maintain full completion status through Managed SDB's KV API integration and SDB Performance's hardware profiling work.
